title: polygala kalaxariensis
intro: Polygala kalaxariensis, also known as Kalaxeri, is a plant species in the Polygalaceae family, native to Sri Lanka, and is commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Polygala kalaxariensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
